# GitHub Social Preview Image

This directory should contain a social preview image for GitHub.

## Required Image

Create an image named `social-preview.png` with the following specifications:

- **Dimensions**: 1280 x 640 pixels (2:1 aspect ratio)
- **Format**: PNG
- **Content**: Viberglass logo or branding with tagline

## Usage

This image will be displayed when the repository is shared on social media platforms.

## Design Guidelines

- Use the Viberglass brand colors
- Include the project name prominently
- Keep text minimal and readable at small sizes
- Consider including the tagline: "AI Agent Orchestrator and Platform"

## Tools

You can create this image using:
- Figma
- Canva
- Adobe Express
- Any image editor

## Temporary Placeholder

Until a proper image is created, GitHub will use the first suitable image found in the repository (typically from the README).
